item.name: Retrieve tracking information for a parcel

request.name: Retrieve tracking information for a parcel

description.content: Get information about a parcel, including its current status and recent tracking events, using its tracking number

response.name: OK

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

response.body:
{

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Create an external parcel for tracking

request.name: Create an external parcel for tracking

description.content: Register an external parcel in the Sendcloud system for tracking, based on the provided details. It requires a valid tracking number and parcel information.

response.name: Successful Response

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

description.content:
The Parcel Tracking API allows you to register parcels for tracking and retrieve parcel information by tracking number
It supports creating and managing parcel tracking details, including associated addresses, measurements, and insurance


Contact Support:
 Name: Sendcloud API Support
 Email: contact@sendcloud.com
